title: Stone Fragment Is Found in Wreck of Ship That Carried Parthenon Marbles
summary_full: Experts said the fragment, recovered by divers from the Greek culture ministry, matched the style and dimensions of the Parthenon, but that it was too soon to be certain of its provenance.
summary_public: Experts said the fragment, recovered by divers from the Greek culture ministry, matched the style and dimensions of the Parthenon, but that it was too soon to be certain of its provenance.

GR.label: neutral
GR.evidence: recovered by divers from the Greek culture ministry
